fronts.description: Walter Corbitt's undead will haunts the house: misdirection upstairs, then lethal force in the basement.

dangers.impulse: to drive out or slay those who learn his secret
moves: poltergeist show in the spare bedroom (blood, knocks, flying bed)
kill the basement lights at the fuse box and shift the stairs
spend Magic Points on Flesh Ward

dangers.impulse: to stab whoever digs toward the sealed boards
moves: float and stab for 1 MP per round (1D4+2; Extreme may impale)
wrench itself free of a holder via opposed STR vs Corbitt POW
pursue the last person on the basement stairs if they flee

on_tick_visible: a answering knock from inside the walls
the reek thickens on the stair
clocks.on_full: Corbitt commits to murder rather than mere fright — bed attack or floating knife becomes likely on the next intrusion

on_tick_visible: Knott telephones for a progress report
Knott hints the daily rate may stop
Knott threatens to hire someone cheaper
clocks.on_full: Knott arrives at the house demanding results, becoming a complication or replacement PC vehicle

fronts.description: The Chapel of Contemplation's burned residue and Pastor Thomas's escape still stain the paper trail — color and optional danger, not the main fight.

dangers.impulse: to injure the careless who poke the weakened floor
moves: Luck then Jump or fall 10 feet into a sealed basement (1D6)
painted Y-triangle eye signs that tingle the forehead while near
